criteria.description: logalyzer summary <file> outputs count by severity level
Summary includes total entry count, time range covered, and parse error count
Summary output is human-readable text to stdout

verification.evidence: Summarize() builds LevelCounts map by incrementing per entry.Level. Format() outputs sorted 'Counts by level:' section. Unit tests TestAG1_CountBySeverity (info=2, warn=1, error=2), TestAG1_CountBySeverityEmpty (empty input), TestAG1_CountBySeverityMissingLevel (empty-string level). Integration test TestAG1_AG2_SummaryCommand verifies 'error' and 'info' appear in CLI output from a real NDJSON file.

Summary struct has TotalCount (len(entries)), Earliest/Latest (min/max timestamps), ParseErrorCount (passed from parser). ParseNDJSONResult returns ParseResult with ParseErrors count. Unit tests: TestAG2_TotalCount (5 entries), TestAG2_TimeRange (correct earliest/latest), TestAG2_TimeRangeNoTimestamps (zero values), TestAG2_ParseErrorCount (3 errors), TestAG2_ParseResultErrorCount (2 malformed lines counted). Integration test checks 'Total entries: 3', 'Parse errors: 1', both timestamp strings.

Format() builds human-readable text with '=== Log Summary ===' header, labeled fields, aligned columns. runSummary() prints via fmt.Print to stdout; errors go to stderr. TestAG1_AG2_FormatOutput checks all key sections present. TestAG1_AG2_FormatNoTimestamps checks '(no timestamps)' fallback. Integration test captures stdout from compiled binary.

verificationReports.summary: All 3 acceptance criteria pass. Pre-flight clean: build, test (11 aggregate + 1 integration), vet, gofmt all green. Summarize() correctly counts by severity, computes time range, tracks parse errors. Format() produces deterministic sorted output. ParseResult/ParseNDJSONResult is additive and backward-compatible with existing ParseNDJSON/ParseNDJSONWithWarnings signatures. All error strings have unique 12-digit debug numbers. Edge cases covered: empty input, no timestamps, missing levels, parse errors. No TODOs, no placeholders, no external deps.
